case_title: ANTON KALAFATI VS. ROBLES CONCRETE DESIGN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-17-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-31-2024 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF, ANTON KALAFATI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT, ROBLES CONCRETE DESIGN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MOTION TO VACATE FILED ON AUGUST 5, 2024 - DENIED.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF ANTON KALAFATI IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROBLES CONCRETE DESIGN IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KIMBERY ROBLES. JUDGE: SAMUEL FENG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
